Consensus on type and empty amounts. Description is a merge: 'Tew' from gemini-flash and 'placed' from gpt-5-mini after visual verification. The last word is clearly 'placed', and 'Tew' looks more like 'Tew' than 'Ten'.

rows.description: Feb. 20 Pd for Survey of L. Whittenham Vicarage for as-suring its annual Value of the wood. Leighton Bussard
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values and type. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately captured the date ('Feb. 20' not 'Oct. 20') and the full extent of the descriptive text, including 'L.' and 'Leighton Bussard'. gpt-5-mini missed these details and had an incorrect date.

rows.description: To make up a Deficiency in the Dividends at p. 61. 62. & 64. &c.

rows.description: Do To Mr Dally. Int. of Library Fund. Mich. 1825
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values and type. Description from gemini-flash, confirmed 'Do' and 'Mr Dally' via visual inspection. gpt-5-mini missed 'Do' and misread 'Dally' as 'Dudley'.

Consensus across all extractors. Visual verification confirms text and amounts.

Consensus on monetary values and type. Description corrected by visual inspection: Both extractors incorrectly included a date from the margin into the main description text, and also misread details. The main description text starts with 'To Mr Best. DW. p. 416-419'. 'Best' and 'DW.' from gemini-flash are accurate. Excluded the marginal date 'Dec. 6. 1824' from the description field as per visual placement.

rows.description: Oct. 7. 1825 To Mr Williams. Do - Do
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary values and type, including the 0.75 pence fraction. Description from gemini-flash, corrected date for accuracy (Oct. 7, not Oct. 17 as per gpt-5-mini) and confirmed dash. The date is present in the marginalia but integrated into the description to maintain consistency with extractor output format.

Consensus on monetary values and type. Description from gpt-5-mini, corrected the date to match marginalia ('18 Nov. 1825') and ensured correct spacing for page numbers. gemini-flash had an incorrect date ('12. 1825').

Consensus on monetary values and type, including the 0.75 pence fraction. Visual verification confirms the amount and 3/4 fraction are explicitly written in the description area.
